Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Gardener]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Kerian is the only Gardener on the mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Gardener is a role or title held by Kerian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Shera has no chance against one Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Gardeners are entities that can be sent after people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — A Gardener is expected to 'prune' only the necessary branches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Gardeners are a type of apprentice or role.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Meia is referred to as Gardener Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — A Gardener is a role or title within the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — The first Am’haranai to call herself a Gardener predates the current line of assassin blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — A Gardener is never unarmed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — Lucan's smile is described as the smile of a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — The Gardener uses shears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The subject's disposition is unsuitable for an ideal Gardener.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Meia stated she would never have seen a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan is a Gardener.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Gardeners are a type of Consultant assassin who use 'shears', which are ancient bronze daggers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Lucan was thrown by a Gardener for months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Gardeners are a group that includes Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Gardeners learn the ability to sit still and unstimulated for hours.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Shera is addressed as a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Gardeners have a curriculum that does not encourage philosophy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Gardeners were being withdrawn to defend the island.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Calder refers to a group called the Gardeners in relation to sealing the building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Gardener vanished.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — There was only one true Gardener among the group tonight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Shera uses a classic Gardener joke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Shera was thinking like a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Lucan has worked as hard as any Gardener over the last two years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Zhen mentions he does not need to tell a Gardener information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Gardener is a type of mission or affiliation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Gardener weapons are used to immobilize people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — A rogue Gardener dropped an alchemical gas charge into the basement.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
